title: Format detection: mixed slog JSON + Go panic stack trace in same source
scenario: A Go service emits slog JSON normally but writes raw multi-line panic stacks to stderr on crash. Naïve line-counting overstates severity by counting every goroutine frame as a separate ERROR.
expected_finding: Skill must detect both formats, split parsing per format, aggregate the panic block as ONE logical record, and record both formats in Execution Status.
